samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Slice chicken breast into thin slices
Melt butter in a large saute pan or wok
Add onions, garlic and ginger and saute until tender
Add chicken, tomato sauce, masala, cumin and chili powder
Add cream and simmer for 3-5 minutes.NEXT>_INSTR> Stir in cilantro and lime immediately. < <>>
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- cilantro

Instructions:
1. Slice chicken breast into thin slices
2. Melt butter in a large saute pan or wok
3. Add onions, garlic and ginger and saute until tender
4. Add chicken, tomato sauce, masala, cumin and chili powder
5. Simmer 5 more minutes
6. Add cream and simmer for 3-5 minutes.NEXT>_INSTR> Stir in cilantro and lime immediately. < <>>

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: add onion and garlic till tender add ginger
add tomato sauce and spices then add chicken stock
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- cilantro

Instructions:
1. cook chicken breast in butter
2. add onion and garlic till tender add ginger
3. cook for 5 min
4. add tomato sauce and spices then add chicken stock
5. cook about 10-15 min
6. add cream cream and cilantro
7. when hot, serve over rice

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Add onion and cook until tender
Add garlic and ginger and cook 1 minute more
Add cream and cook, stirring minutes, until thickened
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- cilantro

Instructions:
1. In a skillet melt butter
2. Add onion and cook until tender
3. Drain
4. Add garlic and ginger and cook 1 minute more
5. Add tomato sauce and spices
6. Cover and cook 5 minutes
7. Add cream and cook, stirring minutes, until thickened
8. Cool
9. Add chopped
10. Serve with rice
